Fingerprint Coordination

Certified Fingerprint Capture — Christchurch, NZ

SAPS requires fingerprints taken by a certified technician using accepted digital equipment.

We coordinate this step with our trusted partner, Fingerprint Services NZ, who provide certified digital capture in Christchurch with flexible appointment availability.

Once captured, we handle integration into your clearance application and SAPS submission — so there's nothing else for you to manage.

ℹ️

Please note: Fingerprint capture is performed by certified partner technicians at Fingerprint Services NZ — not by Elanza Muller. Elanza coordinates booking, documentation preparation, and SAPS submission only.

🖐 Book Fingerprints via Partner ↗

You submit your application

03

Partner technician captures prints

Certified digital capture — SAPS-accepted format

04

We submit to SAPS

Fingerprints + documents submitted directly to South African Police Service

Urgent Timeline? We Can Help.

Meet Your Specialist
Elanza Muller
SAPS Clearance Coordinator · Forensic Insight Ltd

Elanza Muller leads South African Police Clearance coordination in Christchurch, working with Forensic Insight Ltd to ensure compliant fingerprint recording and structured application preparation for South Africans living across New Zealand.

With a thorough understanding of SAPS requirements and an established relationship with certified fingerprint service providers, Elanza ensures every application is documented correctly, submitted compliantly, and tracked through to completion.

Based in Christchurch, Elanza serves clients across Canterbury, the South Island, and remotely throughout New Zealand — keeping every client informed at every step.

Frequently Asked Questions

Common Questions

⚙ schema.org/FAQPage · Rich Snippets

How long does SA police clearance take from NZ?

+

Standard SAPS processing takes 6–10 weeks from submission. Fast-track preparation is available for urgent timelines. We notify you at every milestone so you're never left waiting.

Do I need to travel to South Africa?

+

No. Everything is coordinated from Christchurch. Fingerprints are captured locally by our certified partner technicians using SAPS-accepted digital equipment.

Does Elanza take my fingerprints herself?

+

No. Fingerprint capture is performed by certified partner technicians at Fingerprint Services NZ. Elanza coordinates your booking, prepares documentation, and manages SAPS submission.

What documents do I need?

+

South African ID or passport, proof of current address, and completed application forms. When you get started we send a full document checklist tailored to your situation.

How much does SAPS clearance coordination cost?

+

Our service is approximately $200 more cost-effective than most competing services. Contact us directly for the current fee schedule and everything included in your application.

Which countries accept a South African Police Clearance?

+

SAPS clearance is accepted for NZ, Australia, UK, Canada, UAE, Singapore and most OECD countries. We advise on specific country format requirements when you get started.

Can I get clearance for multiple past addresses?

+

Yes. SAPS clearance covers your full South African criminal record regardless of how many provinces you lived in. One application covers all of them.

What if I have an urgent deadline?

+

WhatsApp Elanza directly with your deadline. We offer fast-track preparation, priority fingerprint scheduling, and expedited submission — noting SAPS processing timelines are external.
